---

### Enabling "Add to MyMind" (Services menu)

macOS makes third-party services opt-in. After updating, enable it in **System Settings → Keyboard → Keyboard Shortcuts → Services** by ticking **Add to MyMind**. It's listed under the **Pictures** section (not Text), because it also accepts images and files. For the right-click menu, enable the **context menu** checkbox too. If it still doesn't appear, log out and back in to rebuild the system's Services cache.
